tech.title: What can AI do for your MRI?
tech.subtitle: Transforms the acquisition of entire scans with reduced time — imagine performing a lumbar spine scan in under 5 minutes on 1.5T machines!

pipeline.title: Denoising
pipeline.desc: Deep neural networks remove noise from rapid acquisition, preserving the signal's structure.

pipeline.title: Super-Resolution
pipeline.desc: Intelligent recovery of spatial resolution. Reconstructs fine details and edges.

pipeline.title: Final Sharpening
pipeline.desc: Fine-tuning of contrast and enhancement of anatomical edges for quality superior to the original.

compliance.title: Security and regulations you can trust.
compliance.subtitle: Our solution focuses on making your MRI scans faster using validated and secure protocols, in full compliance with the main health and data protection standards.

cards.hipaaTitle: Health Insurance Portability and Accountability Act
cards.hipaaDesc: International standard for protecting patients' health information.
cards.anvisaDesc: Software as a medical device duly registered with Anvisa.
cards.lgpdDesc: Compliance with the General Data Protection Law — privacy by design.
cards.digitalDesc: End-to-end encryption, digital certificates, and local processing on the hospital's network.

flow.title: Complete solution map.
flow.subtitle: A continuous, secure, and automated workflow: from acquisition to diagnosis in minutes.

steps.desc: GE / Siemens / Philips MRI with optimized protocol

boxes.d: Data is processed locally. No images leave the hospital's network (LGPD).
Keeps all original DICOM tags for full compatibility with PACS.
24/7 system with a resilient queue and continuous monitoring.

items.q: How does integration with my PACS work?
items.a: TurboMR receives images via DICOM C-STORE and automatically returns the processed series to the PACS. No changes to the radiologist's workflow.

items.q: Do I need to replace my MRI equipment?
items.a: No. TurboMR is compatible with GE, Siemens, and Philips equipment. We work on the existing acquisition, with no additional hardware in the exam room.

items.q: Does the AI create artifacts or invent structures?
items.a: No. Our pipeline preserves the original signal and only removes noise and recovers resolution. No 'hallucinations' — 100% DICOM compatible.

items.q: Does the data leave the hospital?
items.a: No. All processing is local (on-premise). No images are sent over the internet. Fully compliant with LGPD.
On the contrary. The AI increases SNR and sharpness, allowing for clearer visualization of subtle anatomical details, even in accelerated acquisitions.
No. The images arrive at the PACS as standard series, ready for reporting. The reading workflow remains identical.

lp.metaTitle: Boost your MRI productivity by 40%+ | TurboMR
lp.metaDescription: More scans per day, more revenue, less time for the patient inside the scanner. See the financial and operational results TurboMR delivers to clinics and hospitals.
lp.h1: More scans, more revenue, more comfortable patients
lp.subheadline: TurboMR speeds up your MRI by up to 50% with AI — no equipment swap. The result: 40%+ extra capacity in the same shift and a better patient experience.
bullets: +40% more scans per day on the same equipment
Patients spend up to half the time inside the machine

lp.benefitsSub: Proven technology, focused on revenue and on what matters most: the patient.

benefits.title: +40% capacity
benefits.desc: More scans in the same shift, with the same team and the same scanner. Grow without CAPEX.

benefits.title: Immediate extra revenue
benefits.desc: Every additional scan is direct margin. Typical ROI in a few months, with a clear, measurable payback.

benefits.title: Patient comfort
benefits.desc: Time inside the scanner cut in half. Less claustrophobia, fewer motion artifacts, better experience.

benefits.title: Shorter waiting list
benefits.desc: Reduce the waiting time for an MRI and improve referring physicians' satisfaction.

benefits.title: Diagnostic quality preserved
benefits.desc: AI dedicated to reconstruction: keeps signal fidelity and report confidence.

benefits.title: Painless deployment
benefits.desc: Compatible with GE, Siemens and Philips. Integrates with your PACS via DICOM, no change to the radiologist's workflow.
